Uses of Interface
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava.MultimapVerifier

Packages that use MultimapVerifier 
Package Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements
The Requirements, DefaultRequirements endpoints.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of Guava types.

  • Uses of MultimapVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements

    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.requirements that return MultimapVerifier 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    static <K,​ V> MultimapVerifier<K,​V> DefaultRequirements.assertThat​(Multimap<K,​V> actual, String name)
    Same as DefaultRequirements.requireThat(Multimap, String) but does nothing if assertions are disabled.
    <K,​ V> MultimapVerifier<K,​V> Requirements.assertThat​(Multimap<K,​V> actual, String name)
    Same as Requirements.requireThat(Multimap, String) but does nothing if assertions are disabled.
    static <K,​ V> MultimapVerifier<K,​V> DefaultRequirements.requireThat​(Multimap<K,​V> actual, String name)
    Verifies the requirements of a Multimap.
    <K,​ V> MultimapVerifier<K,​V> Requirements.requireThat​(Multimap<K,​V> actual, String name)
    Verifies the requirements of a Multimap.

  • Uses of MultimapVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava

    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava that return MultimapVerifier 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    <K,​ V> MultimapVerifier<K,​V> GuavaRequirements.assertThat​(Multimap<K,​V> actual, String name)
    Same as GuavaRequirements.requireThat(Multimap, String) but does nothing if assertions are disabled.
    MultimapVerifier<K,​V> MultimapVerifier.entries​(Consumer<CollectionVerifier<Collection<Map.Entry<K,​V>>,​Map.Entry<K,​V>>> consumer)
    Verifies nested requirements.
    MultimapVerifier<K,​V> MultimapVerifier.isEmpty()
    Ensures that the actual value is empty.
    MultimapVerifier<K,​V> MultimapVerifier.isNotEmpty()
    Ensures that the actual value is not empty.
    MultimapVerifier<K,​V> MultimapVerifier.keySet​(Consumer<CollectionVerifier<Set<K>,​K>> consumer)
    Verifies nested requirements.
    <K,​ V> MultimapVerifier<K,​V> GuavaRequirements.requireThat​(Multimap<K,​V> actual, String name)
    Verifies the requirements of a Multimap.
    MultimapVerifier<K,​V> MultimapVerifier.size​(Consumer<SizeVerifier> consumer)
    Verifies nested requirements.
    MultimapVerifier<K,​V> MultimapVerifier.values​(Consumer<CollectionVerifier<Collection<V>,​V>> consumer)
    Verifies nested requirements.
